effects.name: Box Blur
effects.description: Applies a fast separable box blur with a controllable pixel radius.

effects.name: Chromatic Blur
effects.description: Blurs red, green, and blue at different separable radii for a soft chromatic fringe.

effects.name: Directional Blur
effects.description: Builds a smooth linear motion blur through two directional sampling stages.

effects.name: Gaussian Blur
effects.description: Applies a separable Gaussian blur with independent horizontal and vertical passes.

effects.name: Radial Blur
effects.description: Creates a center-controlled zoom blur using two progressive radial integration passes.

effects.name: Tilt Shift
effects.description: Keeps a horizontal focus band sharp while applying a separable variable-radius blur outside it.

effects.name: Channel Mixer
effects.description: Recombines RGB input channels through a configurable three-by-three color matrix.

effects.name: Duotone
effects.description: Maps image luminance between two configurable colors.

effects.name: Exposure
effects.description: Adjusts exposure in photographic stops with offset and pivoted contrast controls.

effects.name: Gradient Map
effects.description: Maps image luminance across configurable shadow, midpoint, and highlight colors.

effects.name: HSV Shift
effects.description: Animatable hue, saturation, and value adjustment in HSV color space.

effects.name: Levels
effects.description: Remaps input black and white points through gamma into configurable output levels.

effects.name: Lift Gamma Gain
effects.description: Provides independent RGB lift, gamma, and gain controls for primary color correction.

effects.name: Posterize
effects.description: Quantizes RGB channels into a configurable number of color levels.

effects.name: Temperature Tint
effects.description: Balances warm-to-cool temperature and green-to-magenta tint while retaining luminance.

effects.name: Bulge Pinch
effects.description: Creates a localized aspect-correct bulge or pinch around a configurable center and radius.

effects.name: Displacement Map
effects.description: Offsets image sampling with the red and green channels of a second TOP.

effects.name: Flow Field Warp
effects.description: Warps the source with an external RG vector field; it does not compute the field.

effects.name: Kaleidoscope
effects.description: Reflects polar wedges to form an animatable kaleidoscope.

effects.name: Lens Distortion
effects.description: Applies aspect-correct barrel or pincushion lens distortion around a movable center.

effects.name: Mirror
effects.description: Folds either image axis across independently positioned mirror seams.

effects.name: Polar Coordinates
effects.description: Remaps Cartesian output coordinates to angular and radial image coordinates.

effects.name: Ripple
effects.description: Animates concentric, decaying image ripples from a movable origin.

effects.name: Twirl
effects.description: Rotates pixels around a configurable center with radial falloff.

effects.name: Wave Warp
effects.description: Applies animated sine-wave displacement along both image axes.

effects.name: Block Shift
effects.description: Animates deterministic horizontal offsets across randomized image blocks.

effects.name: Digital Noise
effects.description: Adds seeded, frame-stepped monochrome or RGB digital noise at adjustable pixel sizes.

effects.name: RGB Split
effects.description: Offsets red, green, and blue samples in opposing directions.

effects.name: Scan Tear
effects.description: Produces frame-stepped horizontal tears across randomized scan bands.

effects.name: Slice Shift
effects.description: Slides alternating horizontal slices with independently phased animated offsets.

effects.name: Bloom
effects.description: Extracts highlights, blurs them horizontally and vertically, then adds the result back as HDR bloom.

effects.name: Edge Glow
effects.description: Detects luminance edges with a Sobel pass, softens the edge field, and adds a colored glow to the source.

effects.name: Glow
effects.description: Extracts luminance into a user-tinted halo, spreads it in two stages, and composites it over the source.

effects.name: Normal Lighting
effects.description: Lights an image with a supplied tangent-space normal map and adjustable light vector.

effects.name: Optical Flow Warp
effects.description: Warps an image with a supplied optical-flow texture; flow estimation is intentionally external.

effects.name: Sharpen
effects.description: Enhances horizontal and vertical high-frequency detail in two separable sharpening passes.

effects.name: Unsharp Mask
effects.description: Builds a separable Gaussian reference and adds thresholded high-frequency detail back to the source.

effects.name: Cellular Automata
effects.description: Evolves a smooth Life-like cellular field with source-driven seeding.

effects.name: Fluid Ink
effects.description: Advects accumulated color through a procedural curl field with source-driven ink injection.

effects.name: Particle Advection
effects.description: Advects bright source particles through a procedural vector field with persistent trails.

effects.name: Reaction Diffusion
effects.description: Advances a Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion state seeded by source luminance.

effects.name: Depth Parallax
effects.description: Offsets source pixels with a supplied depth map to simulate a movable viewpoint.

effects.name: Edge Detect
effects.description: Extracts adjustable Sobel-style luminance edges with monochrome and source-color modes.

effects.name: Emboss
effects.description: Creates directional raised and recessed relief from opposing image samples.

effects.name: Frosted Glass
effects.description: Refracts the image with deterministic cell noise, then softens the displaced result like textured glass.

effects.name: Halftone
effects.description: Renders luminance as an angle-adjustable field of print-style halftone dots.

effects.name: Ordered Dither
effects.description: Quantizes color with a scalable four-by-four ordered threshold pattern.

effects.name: Pixelate
effects.description: Reduces apparent image resolution into adjustable pixel blocks.

effects.name: Scanlines
effects.description: Adds animated CRT-style scanlines, flicker, and subtle RGB grille separation.

effects.name: Sepia
effects.description: Builds a controllable warm sepia palette from luminance and retained source chroma.

effects.name: VHS
effects.description: Combines animated line jitter, chroma delay, scanlines, noise, and tracking distortion.

effects.name: Vignette
effects.description: Darkens or colors image edges with adjustable roundness and softness.

effects.name: Echo
effects.description: Layers a displaced, color-tinted echo from the previous frame behind the source.

effects.name: Feedback Kaleidoscope
effects.description: Folds recursive feedback into mirrored radial segments.

effects.name: Feedback Rotate
effects.description: Rotates and scales the prior frame before recursively blending it into the source.

effects.name: Feedback Trails
effects.description: Accumulates luminous trails from prior frames with controllable drift and decay.

effects.name: Frame Blend
effects.description: Blends the current image with accumulated history for temporal smoothing.

effects.name: Motion Smear
effects.description: Samples feedback along a controllable vector to create directional temporal smearing.

effects.name: Recursive Zoom
effects.description: Recursively zooms feedback around a movable center to form tunnel trails.

effects.name: Stutter
effects.description: Freezes feedback state on demand for rhythmic frame-hold effects.

effects.name: Temporal Glitch
effects.description: Replaces randomized image blocks with offset history for controllable digital dropouts.

effects.name: Time Displacement
effects.description: Selects current or historical pixels from a luminance-driven temporal mask.

effects.name: Directional Wipe
effects.description: Wipes between two images along an arbitrary angle with a controllable soft edge.

effects.name: Luma Wipe
effects.description: Reveals a second image according to the luminance structure of the first image.

effects.name: Noise Dissolve
effects.description: Transitions between two images through a seeded procedural noise field.

effects.name: Radial Wipe
effects.description: Expands or contracts a circular transition around a movable, aspect-correct center.
